title: UI Graph Contracts Schema
description: Static CI contract specification defining required data structures, keys, and validation rules for every graph used in the dashboard.

burndown_curve.description: Tracks remaining agile points vs ideal burndown over time.

required_fields.name: remaining_points
required_fields.description: Actual backlog points remaining at this timestamp.

required_fields.name: ideal_points
required_fields.description: Target/ideal burndown baseline points at this timestamp.

first_time_yield_gauge.description: Displays the First Time Yield (FTY) quality percentage.

required_fields.name: fty_percentage
required_fields.description: First time yield quality pass percentage (0.0 to 100.0).

tickets_per_day_chart.description: Bar chart tracking completed/merged tickets per day or sprint.

required_fields.name: tickets_merged
required_fields.description: Count of tickets merged/completed during this period.

safety_avg_chart.description: Bar chart tracking weekly average safety scores and physiological audit averages.

required_fields.name: safety_avg_score
required_fields.description: Overall average safety compliance score (0.0 to 100.0).

required_fields.name: avg_incidents
required_fields.description: Average number of incidents per period.

required_fields.name: avg_near_misses
required_fields.description: Average number of near misses per period.
